ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played */,
  "day_num" INTEGER /* Day of the season the game was played */,
  "wteam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "lteam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "cr_type" TEXT /* Type of game (Regular or Playoff) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_lteam_id FOREIGN KEY ("lteam_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_wteam_id FOREIGN KEY ("wteam_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "num_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "top_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top-performing team in the season */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Any penalties or fouls that occurred during the game */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "minutes_played" TEXT /* Total minutes the player was on the court */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "team_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the game */,
  "opponent_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the opponent in the game */,
  "team_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the team */,
  "team_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "team_steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made by the team */,
  "team_blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the team */,
  "team_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "player_photo" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, player) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "ut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ut_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_players" (
  "up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-player relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
